task_completion.description: Open the T8_housing_bracket.FCStd file in FreeCAD.
task_completion.visual_evidence: FreeCAD window is open with 'T8_housing_bracket' visible in the Tree View or window title. A 3D model of a mechanical bracket is visible in the main 3D view.
The workbench selector dropdown at the top of the FreeCAD window shows 'TechDraw', and TechDraw-specific icons (like Insert Page, Insert View) are visible in the toolbar.

task_completion.description: Create a new technical drawing page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 2D drawing page (typically with a default template/title block) is visible in the main view area. A 'Page' object (TechDraw::DrawPage) appears in the Tree View.

task_completion.description: Insert a standard orthographic view of the bracket body into the drawing page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 2D projection of the bracket is visible on the drawing page. A 'View' object (TechDraw::DrawViewPart) is nested under the Page in the Tree View.

task_completion.description: Create a section view showing the internal details of the bracket body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A cross-section view of the bracket is visible on the drawing page, showing internal features with standard cross-hatching. A 'SectionView' object (TechDraw::DrawViewSection) appears in the Tree View, typically linked to the standard view.

task_completion.description: Save the resulting file as housing_drawing.FCStd in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the filename 'housing_drawing.FCStd' being saved to ~/Documents/FreeCAD/, or the FreeCAD window title updates to 'housing_drawing.FCStd', or a terminal/file manager verifies the file's existence at the expected path.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the FreeCAD GUI to create the drawing and views.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the mouse cursor interacting with FreeCAD menus, toolbars, or the Tree View, rather than the agent just running a Python script in the terminal to generate the file.

integrity.description: The section view is genuinely generated by FreeCAD's TechDraw workbench.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Tree View shows a proper TechDraw SectionView object. The section view displays standard FreeCAD cross-hatching, proving it is not a manually drawn sketch or an imported image.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file using FreeCAD's save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog is seen interacting with the FreeCAD application, or the FreeCAD window title updates to the new filename.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/housing_drawing.FCStd. The input file T8_housing_bracket.FCStd contains a PartDesign body with mechanical features. A correct technical drawing in FreeCAD requires three specific TechDraw objects visible in the Tree View: 'TechDraw::DrawPage' (the document container), 'TechDraw::DrawViewPart' (the base orthographic view), and 'TechDraw::DrawViewSection' (the cross-section view showing internal geometry).
